concept: Morning / Early Part of Day / Time of Awakening
description: The period of time from sunrise to noon; the beginning of the day's light. 'Kelua' names the time of awakening—fresh energy, new beginning, the day opening.
sound_symbolism: The word awakens. 'Ke' begins with clear alertness, consciousness stirring. 'Lu' flows into wakefulness. Finally 'a' opens to the new day, morning arrived.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'mua kelua' (in the morning). One of six named divisions of the day cycle. Time of beginning and fresh energy.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Morning light enables activity without artificial energy—aligning work with natural illumination.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Morning practice sets the day's monae—awakening to awareness before the mind fills with tasks.
